channel.title: Barbados on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Barbados on The Guyana Brief

item.title: Miss Violet's Barbados Bulletin – Thursday, April 9, 2026
item.description: Miss Violet in Brooklyn reads about Barbados and has high standards for everything.

item.title: The Bajan Bugle – Thursday, April 9, 2026
item.description: Bridgetown dispatches — Barbados knows its history less and less, the Fish Festival needs reform, and Barbados Pride is about to remind Jamaica who runs regional cricket.

item.title: Miss Violet's Barbados Bulletin – April 8, 2026
item.description: Miss Violet, retired civics teacher and Barbados institution, responds to the World Bank report, the Air Canada announcement, and the state of the Caribbean.

item.title: The Bajan Bugle – April 8, 2026
item.description: Barbados grows 2.7 percent while Jamaica shrinks. Air Canada non-stop coming. World Bank issues its annual assessment of regional mediocrity.
